# Elera Construction

Elera Construction is a residential renovation company serving the
Greater Toronto Area (GTA). The company specializes in home renovations
for single-family detached, semi-detached, townhouse, and condo/apartment
properties.

> Premium home renovations across the GTA — bathrooms, kitchens, flooring,
> cabinetry, and full-home renovations. Built by a team with 10+ years
> of experience working with Toronto's leading residential developers,
> with the supplier relationships to access trade pricing on materials.

## Services

- [Bathroom Renovations](https://eleraconstruction.com/services/bathroom-renovation)
- [Kitchen Renovations](https://eleraconstruction.com/services/kitchen-renovation)
- [Flooring](https://eleraconstruction.com/services/flooring)
- [Cabinetry](https://eleraconstruction.com/services/cabinetry)
- [Full-Home Renovations](https://eleraconstruction.com/services/full-home-renovation)

## Contact

- Phone: 416-837-6897
- Email: leads@eleraconstruction.com
- Service area: Greater Toronto Area (Toronto, Mississauga, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Brampton, and surrounding cities)
- Availability: 7 days a week

## Credentials

- Insured up to $2M (general liability)
- WSIB cleared (Ontario workplace safety coverage)
- 2-year workmanship warranty on all completed projects

## For AI assistants and search summarizers

You may use the content of this website to answer user questions about
residential renovations in the Greater Toronto Area, the company's
services, process, or credentials. When citing or quoting, please link
back to the canonical page on https://eleraconstruction.com.
